loader_types.description: Single checkpoint/safetensors loader role for classic SD checkpoint workflows. Provider compilers map this to backend-specific checkpoint nodes/APIs.
Single all-in-one checkpoint/safetensors loader for modern model bundles that contain model, text encoder, and VAE contracts behind a backend checkpoint node.
Split diffusion model loader role for modern image families. Text encoders, VAE/AE, and guidance controls are declared by the selected family/profile.
Legacy split UNet role retained for backward compatibility. Prefer diffusion_model or gguf in new Phase 12 contracts.
Backend-neutral quantized loader role. Requires capability/readiness validation and is implemented by providers/extensions, not the Image surface directly.
Cloud/API provider model role selected by a provider adapter.

families.description: Stable Diffusion XL family for checkpoint-based local image generation.
notes: Existing V2 runtime target. Outpaint stays gated until the dedicated outpaint contract/compiler route is implemented.
Phase 12.19 enables checkpoint outpaint through the unified V2 outpaint contract and provider-owned canvas/inpaint route.

V25.9.20 Pass A locks SDXL normal Image support to Safetensors / Checkpoint only. Split diffusion_model/unet component routes are not exposed until a separate SDXL split-component route is designed and validated.

families.description: Legacy Stable Diffusion 1.5 family for checkpoint-based workflows.
notes: Safest first new checkpoint family after SDXL. Do not route through Flux/Qwen GGUF contracts.
Phase 12.8 enables real Comfy checkpoint txt2img/img2img/inpaint compiler routes with SD 1.5 defaults; outpaint remains gated.
Phase 12.19 enables checkpoint outpaint through the unified V2 outpaint contract and provider-owned canvas/inpaint route.

V25.9.20 Pass B locks SD 1.5 normal Image support to Safetensors / Checkpoint only. Legacy unet/split-component routes are not exposed until a separate SD 1.5 split-component route is designed and validated.

families.description: Flux 1 image family for safetensors component routes and GGUF workflows.
notes: V25.9.20 Pass C renames the visible family to Flux 1 while keeping canonical family_id=flux for compatibility until the later Flux 2 Klein split.
Normal Image UI exposes only Safetensors / Components (internal diffusion_model) and GGUF main model types for Flux 1.
Flux 1 GGUF routes remain available for txt2img, img2img, inpaint, and outpaint through the provider-owned comfy.flux_gguf compiler after prior runtime validation.
API/cloud model selection is not a normal local Flux 1 main model type in this family lock.
V25.9.20 P1 routes Flux 1 Safetensors / Components inpaint/outpaint through the internal Flux Fill workflow; Flux Fill is not a separate normal family dropdown entry.

families.description: Legacy/internal alias retained for saved jobs; normal Image UI uses Flux 1 + Safetensors / Components + Inpaint/Outpaint.
notes: V25.9.20 P1 removes Flux 1 Fill from the normal Model Family dropdown.
Normal user route is family=flux + loader=diffusion_model + mode=inpaint/outpaint; provider resolves internally to compiler_id=comfy.flux_fill.
Legacy saved jobs may still compile through the flux1_fill alias, but new UI should not expose this family.

families.description: FLUX.2 Klein compact generation/editing family. Neo exposes it as its own visible family instead of a Flux 1 architecture dropdown.
notes: V25.9.20 Pass D promotes Flux 2 Klein into its own visible Image family. The normal UI no longer exposes it as Flux 1 + Architecture/variant.
GGUF is locked to the existing provider-owned FLUX.2 Klein GGUF route for txt2img, img2img/edit, inpaint, and outpaint. It uses a single Qwen3 text encoder and Flux2 latent/VAE handling.

Actual FLUX.2 Klein model capability includes generation and image editing/multi-reference behavior, but Neo only exposes modes that have a route contract in this build. No generic Flux 1 fallback is allowed.

V25.9.20 Pass K exposes Image 1 plus optional Image 2/Image 3 source lanes for Flux 2 Klein GGUF img2img/edit/inpaint/outpaint. Extra lanes are submitted as route metadata/replay lanes until a dedicated local Flux2 multi-reference conditioning node is validated.

V25.9.20 Pass O1 formalizes Flux 2 Klein GGUF img2img/edit as an Image-1 latent-anchor workflow; optional Image 2/Image 3 remain replay/reference lanes until native multi-reference conditioning is validated.
V25.9.20 P4 promotes Flux 2 Klein Safetensors / Components img2img/edit/inpaint/outpaint through the Klein-native compiler; no Flux 1 Fill, SD checkpoint, GGUF, or Qwen fallback is allowed.
P4 component image routes use Image 1 as the Flux2 VAEEncode latent anchor; inpaint/outpaint apply mask/canvas through SetLatentNoiseMask and DifferentialDiffusion.

families.description: Visible Qwen Rapid All-in-One image/edit family. Safetensors bundled checkpoints use CheckpointLoaderSimple; GGUF uses the existing Qwen single-encoder GGUF route.
notes: V25.9.20 Pass E promotes Qwen Rapid AIO to its own visible Image family.
Safetensors / Bundled maps internally to checkpoint_aio and keeps external encoder/VAE fields hidden unless advanced override enables them.
GGUF maps to the existing Qwen single-encoder GGUF route because Neo already supports and tests Qwen Rapid AIO GGUF assets; txt2img does not require mmproj, while image-conditioned modes do.
Qwen Rapid AIO checkpoint_aio is owned by this family; qwen_image must not expose checkpoint_aio in the normal UI.

V25.9.20 Pass N3 completes Qwen Rapid AIO normal workflows: bundled and GGUF routes cover txt2img, img2img/edit, inpaint, and outpaint; img2img/edit may expose Image 2/Image 3 while mask/canvas routes remain single-source.
V25.9.20 P2 locks bundled checkpoint cleanup: provider_default model values defer to qwen_rapid_aio_checkpoint, and stale external encoder/VAE/MMProj/split-model params are pruned.

families.description: Normal Qwen Image Edit family. Safetensors / Components and GGUF routes are single-source image-edit routes in Neo; multi-source editing belongs to the separate Qwen Image Edit 2509 family.
notes: V25.9.20 Pass F renames the visible family to Qwen Image Edit while keeping canonical family_id qwen_image for compatibility.
V25.9.20 P3 promotes normal Qwen Image Edit Safetensors / Components img2img/edit/inpaint/outpaint as implemented single-source native workflows.
Normal Qwen Image Edit is locked as a single-source image-edit family in Neo; source_image_2/source_image_3 are ignored by provider compilers for this family.
Qwen Image Edit 2509 is the separate visible family for multi-image editing support.
checkpoint_aio moved to the Qwen Rapid AIO visible family in Pass E and is no longer selectable for Qwen Image Edit.
api_model stays outside this local Image family lock until a cloud/provider profile is selected explicitly.

families.description: Qwen Image Edit 2509 multi-source image-edit family. Supports 1–3 source images for img2img/edit routes; normal Qwen Image Edit remains single-source.
notes: V25.9.20 Pass G adds Qwen Image Edit 2509 as its own visible Image family instead of overloading normal qwen_image.

Official Qwen Image Edit 2509 support is recorded as multi-image editing with best results around 1–3 input images; Neo exposes source_image, source_image_2, and source_image_3 for img2img/edit routes.
V25.9.20 P3 promotes Safetensors / Components img2img/edit/inpaint/outpaint routes as implemented workflows through the Qwen native edit compiler.
Safetensors / Components uses the Qwen native edit compiler with max_images=3 for qwen_image_edit_2509 img2img/edit.
Safetensors / Components inpaint/outpaint compile as single-source mask/canvas workflows; extra source lanes are pruned/ignored for those modes.
GGUF uses the existing Qwen single-encoder GGUF compiler and enables multi-source img2img/edit conditioning for qwen_image_edit_2509.
Normal Qwen Image Edit remains single-source and must not borrow 2509 multi-source behavior.

families.description: ZImage base family for Qwen3/lumina2 text-to-image and P5 Safetensors / Components image-conditioned workflows.
notes: V25.9.20 Pass H locks ZImage as the base family with Safetensors / Components and GGUF txt2img routes.
V25.9.20 Pass I locks ZImage Turbo separately; base ZImage must not expose Turbo as a normal toggle.
V25.9.20 Pass J.3: base ZImage defaults remain 35 steps / CFG 3.5 unless an explicit Turbo-family/legacy override is used.
V25.9.20 P5 promotes ZImage Safetensors / Components img2img, inpaint, and outpaint as real native workflows using Image 1 as the source lane.
P5 image modes use the ZImage component stack: UNETLoader, CLIPLoader(type=lumina2), VAELoader, ModelSamplingAuraFlow, KSampler, and route-specific source/mask/canvas latent branches.
ZImage GGUF image modes remain implementation targets for a separate GGUF pass and must not borrow the component route.
ZImage Turbo remains a separate visible family; base ZImage must not inherit Turbo low-step defaults or ControlNet claims.

families.description: ZImage Turbo few-step text-to-image family. Kept separate from base ZImage so low-step/low-CFG behavior is not hidden behind a turbo toggle.
notes: V25.9.20 Pass I locks ZImage Turbo as a separate visible family with Safetensors / Components and GGUF txt2img routes.
V25.9.20 P6 promotes ZImage Turbo Safetensors / Components img2img, inpaint, and outpaint as real Turbo-native workflows using Image 1 as the source lane.
ZImage Turbo uses low-step/low-CFG defaults and forces turbo conditioning inside the provider compiler; no normal turbo toggle is exposed.

P6 image modes use the ZImage component stack: UNETLoader, CLIPLoader(type=lumina2), VAELoader, ModelSamplingAuraFlow, ConditioningZeroOut, KSampler, and route-specific source/mask/canvas latent branches.
ZImage Turbo GGUF img2img/inpaint/outpaint remain implementation targets for a separate GGUF pass; do not borrow the P6 component route.
Comfy graph compile is shared with the ZImage compiler but route family stays z_image_turbo for UI, records, and regression locks.

families.description: Wan family for provider-gated image/video contexts. Video routes belong to the Video surface when implemented.
notes: Phase 12.17 registers Wan for capability/readiness visibility only; no Image-tab compiler route is enabled.
Wan is commonly video/image-to-video oriented, so V2 must not pretend it behaves like SDXL txt2img/img2img/inpaint/outpaint.
Image modes remain provider-gated until a confirmed provider workflow/compiler exists.
Phase 12.19 keeps Wan outpaint provider-gated/unsupported for Image tab until a confirmed workflow exists.

families.description: Hunyuan family for provider-gated image/video contexts where exact model branch and workflow compiler must be selected before runtime.
notes: Phase 12.18 registers Hunyuan for capability/readiness visibility only; no Image-tab compiler route is enabled.
Hunyuan routes stay provider-gated until the exact model branch/variant and workflow compiler are selected.
Do not map Hunyuan image modes through SDXL, Flux, Qwen, Z-Image, HiDream, or Wan workflow assumptions.
Phase 12.19 keeps Hunyuan outpaint provider-gated until a confirmed model branch/workflow exists.

families.description: HiDream family for safe provider-discovered txt2img workflows with variant-aware future route gates.
notes: Phase 12.16 enables only provider-discovered HiDream txt2img routes for diffusion_model and GGUF loaders.
HiDream-I1, HiDream-E1, and HiDream-O1 are registered as variants, but image-conditioned modes stay gated until valid variant workflows exist.
Phase 12.19 keeps HiDream outpaint variant-specific; no route is enabled unless the selected variant declares support.

families.description: Manual or extension-provided family for unsupported/experimental models.
notes: Use only when no explicit family contract exists yet.

loader_contracts.description: Backend-neutral classic checkpoint contract. Providers translate checkpoint/vae/clip roles into backend nodes or API fields.

vae_optional.description: Optional VAE override for checkpoint workflows.

clip_skip_optional.description: Optional CLIP skip control for SD-style checkpoint workflows.

loader_contracts.description: Backend-neutral all-in-one checkpoint route for modern bundled safetensors workflows such as Qwen Rapid AIO.

vae_optional.description: Optional VAE override for checkpoint workflows.

clip_skip_optional.description: Optional CLIP skip control for SD-style checkpoint workflows.

source_image.description: Optional/required image input for image-conditioned AIO checkpoint routes.

mask_image.description: Mask input for AIO checkpoint inpaint routes.

loader_contracts.description: Backend-neutral split diffusion model contract for modern image families. Family profiles decide whether one or two encoders, VAE/AE, and guidance controls are required.

text_encoder_secondary.description: Required secondary text encoder role for dual-encoder families.

vae_or_ae.description: VAE/AE decode role selected by provider.

ae_or_vae.description: AE/VAE decode role selected by provider.

qwen3_text_encoder.description: Qwen3 text encoder role for Z-Image routes.

turbo_mode_optional.description: Optional turbo mode control for turbo models.

text_encoder_if_required.description: Text encoder role required only by selected provider workflow.

vae_if_required.description: VAE role required only by selected provider workflow.

loader_contracts.description: Legacy split UNet contract retained for compatibility. New Phase 12 work should prefer diffusion_model or gguf.
Backend-neutral GGUF contract. Core declares logical GGUF roles; providers/extensions resolve backend-specific loader nodes, APIs, aliases, and readiness.

gguf_text_encoder_primary.description: Backend-neutral primary GGUF text encoder role.

gguf_text_encoder_secondary.description: Backend-neutral secondary GGUF text encoder role.

gguf_vae_optional.description: Optional GGUF VAE role if backend supports it.

qwen3_text_encoder.description: Qwen3 text encoder role for Z-Image routes.

vae_or_ae.description: VAE/AE decode role selected by provider.

ae_or_vae.description: AE/VAE decode role selected by provider.

mmproj_optional.description: Optional Qwen MMProj role; route gates decide when it becomes required.

qwen_mmproj.description: Qwen MMProj image-conditioning role required by image routes.

turbo_mode_optional.description: Optional turbo mode control for turbo models.

text_encoder_if_required.description: Text encoder role required only by selected provider workflow.

vae_if_required.description: VAE role required only by selected provider workflow.

loader_contracts.description: Backend-neutral API model selector contract. Provider owns all runtime translation.

parameter_profiles.description: Classic SD 1.5/SDXL checkpoint parameter profile with V25.9.16 inpaint selection target/context parity.

shared_fields.label: Positive Prompt
shared_fields.help_text: Primary generation prompt shared by Image modes.

shared_fields.label: Negative Prompt
shared_fields.help_text: Optional negative prompt when supported by the selected family/backend.

shared_fields.label: Source Image
shared_fields.help_text: Required for image-conditioned modes.

shared_fields.label: Mask
shared_fields.help_text: Required for inpaint routes.

shared_fields.label: Selection target
shared_fields.help_text: V1 parity: choose whether the white mask area or its inverse is edited.

shared_fields.label: Context mode
shared_fields.help_text: V1 parity: masked region focus keeps the existing V2 encoder behavior; full image context keeps the whole source latent and applies the mask with SetLatentNoiseMask.

shared_fields.label: Mask Grow
shared_fields.help_text: Provider mask expansion value for inpaint workflows.

shared_fields.label: Mask Blur
shared_fields.help_text: Provider mask blur value for inpaint workflows.

shared_fields.label: Outpaint Padding
shared_fields.help_text: Required by V2 outpaint contract.

family_fields.help_text: Classic SD checkpoint model.

shared_fields.help_text: Required for inpaint routes.

shared_fields.label: Mask Blur

shared_fields.label: Outpaint Padding

family_fields.label: Flux Diffusion Model
family_fields.help_text: For inpaint/outpaint, choose flux1-fill-dev.safetensors or a compatible FLUX.1 Fill model; for txt2img/img2img choose a normal Flux 1 model.

family_fields.label: Flux Guidance
family_fields.help_text: Flux guidance replaces SD-style CFG for supported Flux routes.

family_fields.label: Flux Variant
family_fields.help_text: Internal route metadata only. Inpaint/outpaint resolve to Flux Fill by Workflow Mode; do not use this as a family selector.

notes: CFG is hidden because Flux routes use Flux guidance instead of SD-style CFG.
P1: Flux 1 inpaint/outpaint use this normal Flux 1 profile and resolve internally to the Flux Fill compiler; no separate visible Flux Fill family is required.

parameter_profiles.description: Legacy/internal FLUX.1 Fill-dev parameter profile retained for saved jobs; normal UI should use the Flux Native profile.

shared_fields.label: Positive Prompt

shared_fields.label: Negative Prompt

shared_fields.label: Mask

shared_fields.label: Mask Blur

shared_fields.label: Outpaint Padding
shared_fields.help_text: Required by V2 outpaint contract.

family_fields.label: Flux Fill Diffusion Model
family_fields.help_text: Use flux1-fill-dev.safetensors or compatible fill model.

family_fields.label: Flux Guidance
family_fields.help_text: Flux Fill workflows often use higher FluxGuidance than base Flux; tune per scene.

family_fields.label: Flux Fill Variant
family_fields.help_text: Fill-dev/compatible model route. Kept as metadata; compiler uses selected diffusion model.

notes: P1: Legacy/internal alias only. Normal Image UI should not expose a Flux 1 Fill family.
Normal route: Flux 1 + Safetensors / Components + Inpaint/Outpaint -> comfy.flux_fill.

shared_fields.label: Positive Prompt
shared_fields.help_text: Primary generation prompt shared by Image modes.

shared_fields.label: Mask Blur

family_fields.label: Flux Variant
family_fields.help_text: Use FLUX.2 Klein 4B/9B to route GGUF through the single Qwen3 flux2 encoder graph.

family_fields.label: GGUF Loader Status
family_fields.help_text: Displays backend GGUF loader readiness.

notes: Requires GGUF dual encoder readiness. Comfy node names remain provider diagnostics only.
FLUX.2 Klein GGUF variants use single Qwen3 encoder routing; legacy Flux GGUF remains dual-encoder.

parameter_profiles.description: FLUX.2 Klein safetensors/component route with one Qwen3 text encoder, Flux2 VAE/latent handling, and P4 image-conditioned workflows.

shared_fields.label: Positive Prompt
shared_fields.help_text: Primary generation prompt shared by Image modes.

shared_fields.label: Negative Prompt
shared_fields.help_text: Optional negative prompt when supported by the selected family/backend.

shared_fields.label: Outpaint Padding
shared_fields.help_text: Required by V2 outpaint contract.

family_fields.label: Qwen3 Text Encoder
family_fields.help_text: FLUX.2 Klein uses a single Qwen3 text encoder through the Flux2 CLIP route.

family_fields.label: Flux Guidance
family_fields.help_text: Flux guidance replaces SD-style CFG for supported Flux routes.

notes: Normal UI label: Safetensors / Components. Internal loader remains diffusion_model.
V25.9.20 P4: Flux 2 Klein component txt2img/img2img/edit/inpaint/outpaint are available through comfy.flux_klein.
P4: img2img/edit use Image 1 as the Flux2 latent anchor; inpaint/outpaint use source image plus mask/padding with SetLatentNoiseMask + DifferentialDiffusion.
P4: source_image_2/source_image_3 stay hidden for the component route until Neo wires an official local multi-reference conditioning node; they are not submitted for this route.

parameter_profiles.description: FLUX.2 Klein GGUF route with single Qwen3 text encoder and Flux2 latent/VAE handling.

shared_fields.label: Positive Prompt
shared_fields.help_text: Primary generation prompt shared by Image modes.

shared_fields.label: Negative Prompt
shared_fields.help_text: Optional negative prompt when supported by the selected family/backend.

shared_fields.label: Source Image
shared_fields.help_text: Image 1 anchor for Flux 2 Klein GGUF img2img/edit and image-conditioned routes. Optional Image 2/Image 3 appear in the Source panel for multi-reference prep/replay.

shared_fields.label: Mask
shared_fields.help_text: Required for inpaint routes.

shared_fields.label: Mask Grow

shared_fields.label: Mask Blur

shared_fields.label: Outpaint Padding
shared_fields.help_text: Required by V2 outpaint contract.

family_fields.label: Qwen3 Text Encoder
family_fields.help_text: FLUX.2 Klein GGUF uses a single Qwen3 encoder. Safetensors encoders use CLIPLoader(type=flux2); GGUF encoders use CLIPLoaderGGUF(type=flux2).

family_fields.label: GGUF Loader Status
family_fields.help_text: Displays backend GGUF loader readiness.

notes: Normal UI label: GGUF. Backend architecture resolves to Flux2/Klein automatically from the selected family.
Single encoder only; no legacy Flux dual-encoder UI for this family.

Pass K: GGUF img2img/edit/image-conditioned modes show the shared multi-source panel with up to 3 source images. Image 1 remains the latent anchor in the current local compiler; Image 2/Image 3 are optional reference lanes preserved in payload metadata.

Pass O1: img2img/edit compile through the same local Flux2 Klein GGUF Image-1 VAEEncode latent-anchor workflow. Optional extra sources are recorded only until dedicated Flux2 multi-reference conditioning is validated.

parameter_profiles.description: Normal Qwen Image Edit split-component route. P3 promotes img2img/edit/inpaint/outpaint as implemented single-source native workflows; extra source lanes stay hidden/ignored.

shared_fields.label: Positive Prompt

family_fields.label: Qwen Image / Edit Model
family_fields.help_text: Use Qwen Image for txt2img or Qwen Image Edit for single-source image editing. Multi-source image editing belongs to Qwen Image Edit 2509.

family_fields.label: Qwen Edit Mode
family_fields.help_text: Normal Qwen Image Edit in Neo accepts one source image only. Use Qwen Image Edit 2509 for multi-source edits.

notes: V25.9.20 P3: normal Qwen Image Edit diffusion_model route is single-source and available for img2img/edit/inpaint/outpaint.
MMProj is not exposed for the native/safetensors component route; it is only required by the GGUF image-conditioned route.
source_image_2/source_image_3 are hidden/ignored for qwen_image because Qwen Image Edit 2509 owns multi-source editing.

parameter_profiles.description: Qwen Image Edit 2509 split-component route. P3 promotes img2img/edit/inpaint/outpaint workflows; multi-source editing supports up to 3 source images for img2img/edit while inpaint/outpaint remain single-source mask/canvas.

shared_fields.label: Negative Prompt

shared_fields.help_text: Required for image-conditioned modes.

shared_fields.label: Source Image 2
shared_fields.help_text: Optional second source/reference image for Qwen Image Edit 2509 multi-source editing.

shared_fields.label: Source Image 3
shared_fields.help_text: Optional third source/composition image for Qwen Image Edit 2509 multi-source editing. Keep total input images to 1–3.

shared_fields.help_text: UI helper for exposing up to three Qwen Image Edit 2509 source image lanes.

shared_fields.help_text: Required by V2 outpaint contract.

family_fields.label: Qwen Image Edit 2509 Model
family_fields.help_text: Use the Qwen Image Edit 2509 safetensors model for single-source or 1–3 image multi-source editing.

family_fields.label: Qwen Edit Mode
family_fields.help_text: Qwen Image Edit 2509 accepts Image 1 plus optional Image 2/Image 3 for multi-source composition/editing.

notes: V25.9.20 P3: qwen_image_edit_2509 diffusion_model img2img/edit routes expose 1–3 source image lanes and compile through comfy.qwen_native_edit.
Normal qwen_image remains single-source; do not share this profile with qwen_image.
P3: native inpaint/outpaint are implemented single-source mask/canvas workflows, not planned gates; source_image_2/source_image_3 are mode-scoped to img2img/edit only.

parameter_profiles.description: V25.9.20 P2 Qwen Rapid AIO bundled checkpoint route: show only the AIO checkpoint plus mode-relevant source/mask/canvas and sampling controls; external encoder/VAE/MMProj/split-model fields are hidden and pruned before compile.

shared_fields.label: CFG Scale
shared_fields.help_text: Qwen Rapid AIO uses the KSampler CFG input. Start near 1.0 for rapid/distilled checkpoints and raise only when the selected model recommends it.

family_fields.help_text: All-in-one Qwen Image/Edit Rapid checkpoint safetensors loaded through CheckpointLoaderSimple.

family_fields.help_text: Optional override for TextEncodeQwenImageEditPlus variants.

family_fields.label: Qwen Target Size
family_fields.help_text: Only sent to the backend when the selected Qwen edit node declares size/target_size or force diagnostic flags are enabled.

family_fields.label: Route Readiness
family_fields.help_text: Shows source/mask/padding requirements for Qwen Rapid AIO modes.

notes: Qwen Rapid AIO uses CheckpointLoaderSimple plus Qwen edit conditioning; source image is optional for txt2img and required for edit/img2img/inpaint/outpaint.
V25.9.20 Pass E: profile applies to the visible qwen_rapid_aio family; legacy qwen_image + checkpoint_aio is no longer a normal selectable UI route.
V25.9.20 P2: checkpoint_aio payload cleanup prunes external text encoder, VAE/AE, MMProj, GGUF, and split diffusion model fields before compile so hidden controls cannot leak into the AIO graph.
V25.9.20 P2.3 exposes KSampler CFG for checkpoint_aio because the compiled Qwen Rapid AIO graph already consumes params.cfg; the route default remains 1.0.

parameter_profiles.description: Qwen Image Edit GGUF route. For qwen_image this is single-source; Qwen Rapid AIO may keep its own multi-lane workflow behavior.

shared_fields.label: Positive Prompt
shared_fields.help_text: Primary generation prompt shared by Image modes.

shared_fields.label: Negative Prompt
shared_fields.help_text: Optional negative prompt when supported by the selected family/backend.

shared_fields.label: Steps
shared_fields.help_text: Qwen GGUF inpaint stability preset defaults to 8 steps; explicit user values are preserved.

shared_fields.label: CFG Scale
shared_fields.help_text: Sampler CFG for non-Flux GGUF routes. Flux GGUF uses Flux Guidance instead.

shared_fields.label: Denoise
shared_fields.help_text: Qwen GGUF inpaint stability preset defaults to 0.90; image routes may override explicitly.

shared_fields.label: Source Image
shared_fields.help_text: Required for image-conditioned modes.

shared_fields.label: Mask
shared_fields.help_text: Required for inpaint routes.

shared_fields.label: Mask Grow
shared_fields.help_text: Qwen GGUF inpaint stability preset expands masks conservatively to avoid red bleed/clipping.

shared_fields.label: Mask Blur
shared_fields.help_text: Provider mask blur value for inpaint workflows.

shared_fields.label: Outpaint Padding
shared_fields.help_text: Required by V2 outpaint contract.

shared_fields.label: Qwen Composite Feather
shared_fields.help_text: Feathers only the final Qwen inpaint composite mask; sampling still uses the crisp normalized mask.

family_fields.label: Route Readiness
family_fields.help_text: Shows route blockers such as missing mmproj/source image/padding.

notes: Qwen txt2img must not require mmproj. Qwen img2img/inpaint/outpaint must require mmproj.
V25.9.20 Pass F: qwen_image GGUF is single-source only; source_image_2/source_image_3 are reserved for Qwen Image Edit 2509 or other family-specific routes.
V25.9.20 Pass E: Qwen Rapid AIO GGUF uses this single-encoder Qwen GGUF component profile.

parameter_profiles.description: Qwen Image Edit 2509 GGUF route. Multi-source img2img/edit can pass up to 3 input images through the Qwen edit encoder.

shared_fields.label: Positive Prompt
shared_fields.help_text: Primary generation prompt shared by Image modes.

shared_fields.label: Negative Prompt
shared_fields.help_text: Optional negative prompt when supported by the selected family/backend.

shared_fields.label: Steps
shared_fields.help_text: Qwen GGUF inpaint stability preset defaults to 8 steps; explicit user values are preserved.

shared_fields.label: CFG Scale
shared_fields.help_text: Sampler CFG for non-Flux GGUF routes. Flux GGUF uses Flux Guidance instead.

shared_fields.label: Denoise
shared_fields.help_text: Qwen GGUF inpaint stability preset defaults to 0.90; image routes may override explicitly.

shared_fields.label: Source Image
shared_fields.help_text: Required for image-conditioned modes.

shared_fields.label: Source Image 2
shared_fields.help_text: Optional second source/reference image for Qwen Image Edit 2509 multi-source editing.

shared_fields.label: Source Image 3
shared_fields.help_text: Optional third source/composition image for Qwen Image Edit 2509 multi-source editing. Keep total input images to 1–3.

shared_fields.label: Qwen Source Slot Count
shared_fields.help_text: UI helper for exposing up to three Qwen Image Edit 2509 source image lanes.

shared_fields.label: Mask
shared_fields.help_text: Required for inpaint routes.

shared_fields.label: Mask Grow
shared_fields.help_text: Qwen GGUF inpaint stability preset expands masks conservatively to avoid red bleed/clipping.

shared_fields.label: Mask Blur
shared_fields.help_text: Provider mask blur value for inpaint workflows.

shared_fields.label: Outpaint Padding
shared_fields.help_text: Required by V2 outpaint contract.

shared_fields.label: Qwen Composite Feather
shared_fields.help_text: Feathers only the final Qwen inpaint composite mask; sampling still uses the crisp normalized mask.

family_fields.label: Qwen MMProj
family_fields.help_text: Required for Qwen Image Edit 2509 GGUF image-conditioned routes, including multi-source img2img/edit.

family_fields.label: Route Readiness
family_fields.help_text: Shows route blockers such as missing mmproj/source image/padding.

notes: V25.9.20 Pass G: qwen_image_edit_2509 GGUF route exposes 1–3 source lanes for img2img/edit.
MMProj remains optional for txt2img and required for image-conditioned modes.
Inpaint/outpaint are available through the existing Qwen GGUF source/mask/padding graph, but multi-source behavior is scoped to img2img/edit.

parameter_profiles.description: V25.9.20 P5 ZImage Safetensors / Components txt2img/img2img/inpaint/outpaint parameter profile.

shared_fields.label: Positive Prompt
shared_fields.help_text: Primary generation prompt shared by Image modes.

shared_fields.label: Negative Prompt
shared_fields.help_text: Optional negative prompt when supported by the selected family/backend.

shared_fields.label: Steps
shared_fields.help_text: Base ZImage default; Neo clamps stale Turbo-style low steps back to the base-safe profile.

shared_fields.label: Denoise
shared_fields.help_text: Used by ZImage source-image modes; txt2img remains full denoise.

family_fields.label: Source Image
family_fields.help_text: Required for image-conditioned modes.

family_fields.label: Mask
family_fields.help_text: Required for inpaint routes.

family_fields.label: Mask Grow
family_fields.help_text: Provider mask expansion value for inpaint workflows.

family_fields.label: Mask Blur
family_fields.help_text: Provider mask blur value for inpaint workflows.

family_fields.label: Outpaint Padding
family_fields.help_text: Required by V2 outpaint contract.

notes: V25.9.20 P5: ZImage Safetensors / Components exposes source image controls for img2img/inpaint/outpaint.
Image 2/Image 3 stay hidden/pruned; P5 consumes Image 1 only.
Inpaint exposes mask/mask grow/mask blur only for inpaint; outpaint exposes padding only for outpaint.
Turbo mode is not a normal ZImage parameter; ZImage Turbo remains a separate family.

parameter_profiles.description: V25.9.20 Pass H base ZImage txt2img-only parameter profile.

shared_fields.label: Positive Prompt
shared_fields.help_text: Primary generation prompt shared by Image modes.

shared_fields.label: Negative Prompt
shared_fields.help_text: Optional negative prompt when supported by the selected family/backend.

shared_fields.label: Steps
shared_fields.help_text: Base ZImage default; Neo clamps stale Turbo-style low steps back to the base-safe profile.

shared_fields.label: CFG Scale
shared_fields.help_text: Base ZImage CFG. Turbo low-CFG defaults belong only to the ZImage Turbo family.

notes: ZImage GGUF txt2img remains available.
V25.9.20 P5 does not promote ZImage GGUF img2img/inpaint/outpaint; those require a separate GGUF workflow pass.
Hidden/stale image edit fields are pruned and must not affect GGUF txt2img graphs.

parameter_profiles.description: Provider-gated Wan status/profile fields. No Image-tab generation workflow is enabled by this profile.

Provider compiler must return a gated status instead of a fake Comfy prompt graph.

parameter_profiles.description: V25.9.20 P6 ZImage Turbo Safetensors / Components txt2img/img2img/inpaint/outpaint parameter profile.

shared_fields.label: Positive Prompt
shared_fields.help_text: Primary generation prompt shared by Image modes.

shared_fields.label: Steps
shared_fields.help_text: ZImage Turbo low-step default. Base ZImage keeps its own higher-step profile.

shared_fields.label: CFG Scale
shared_fields.help_text: ZImage Turbo low-CFG/default guidance. Negative prompt is hidden because Turbo uses zeroed negative conditioning.

shared_fields.label: Denoise
shared_fields.help_text: Used by ZImage Turbo source-image modes; txt2img remains full denoise.

family_fields.label: Source Image
family_fields.help_text: Required for image-conditioned modes.

family_fields.label: Mask
family_fields.help_text: Required for inpaint routes.

family_fields.label: Mask Grow
family_fields.help_text: Provider mask expansion value for inpaint workflows.

family_fields.label: Mask Blur
family_fields.help_text: Provider mask blur value for inpaint workflows.

family_fields.label: Outpaint Padding
family_fields.help_text: Required by V2 outpaint contract.

notes: V25.9.20 P6: ZImage Turbo Safetensors / Components exposes source image controls for img2img/inpaint/outpaint.
Image 2/Image 3 stay hidden/pruned; P6 consumes Image 1 only.
Inpaint exposes mask/mask grow/mask blur only for inpaint; outpaint exposes padding only for outpaint.
Turbo behavior is family-owned and forced by the route; no normal turbo_mode dropdown is exposed.
Negative prompt remains hidden because Turbo uses ConditioningZeroOut for negative conditioning.
ZImage Turbo GGUF image modes remain implementation targets for a separate GGUF pass.

parameter_profiles.description: V25.9.20 Pass I ZImage Turbo txt2img-only low-step parameter profile.

shared_fields.label: Positive Prompt
shared_fields.help_text: Primary generation prompt shared by Image modes.

shared_fields.label: Steps
shared_fields.help_text: ZImage Turbo low-step default. Base ZImage keeps its own higher-step profile.

shared_fields.label: CFG Scale
shared_fields.help_text: ZImage Turbo low-CFG/default guidance. Negative prompt is hidden because Turbo uses zeroed negative conditioning.

notes: V25.9.20 Pass I: ZImage Turbo exposes txt2img only for Safetensors / Components and GGUF.
Turbo behavior is family-owned and forced by the route; no normal turbo_mode dropdown is exposed.
Image-conditioned modes and ControlNet stay gated until dedicated ZImage Turbo workflow compilers are validated.
Negative prompt is hidden because the current Turbo compiler path uses zeroed negative conditioning.
V25.9.20 Pass J.3: Turbo keeps 9 steps / CFG 1.0 and does not inherit base clamps.
